# Repository Instructions

Always generate documentation for:

- Every file
- Every class
- Every method
- Every interface
- Every enum

Requirements:

- Explain purpose
- Document parameters
- Document return values
- Document exceptions
- Add examples
- Explain business logic
- Generate Markdown docs
- Generate XML comments for C#

When generating documentation:
- Explain WHY not only WHAT
- Avoid repeating code
- Keep descriptions concise
